message:
feat(core): add segment_tree.rs — lazy segment tree for O(log n) range queries and updates (ft-283h4.28)

Implement a Segment Tree with lazy propagation supporting range sum
queries and range additive updates, both in O(log n). Built on an
implicit binary tree stored in a flat array with 1-indexed nodes.

API: from_slice, query, point_update, point_set, range_update,
total_sum, to_vec, reset, stats, memory_bytes.

Includes 28 inline unit tests and 35+ proptest property-based tests
covering: query correctness vs naive, range decomposition, point
update containment/additivity, range update correctness/commutativity/
additivity, point_set isolation, to_vec roundtrip with range updates,
clone equivalence/independence, reset, serde roundtrip, stats
consistency, empty/memory invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
